name: libset-object-perl
title: libset-object-perl
description:
collection of objects without duplications
Set::Object module implements a Set of objects, that is, a collection of
objects without duplications. It is similar to a Smalltalk
IdentitySet.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libset-object-perl because collection of objects without duplications.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libset-object-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libset-object-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libset-object-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
